name: peekaboo
tagline: ClawHub (83★): Capture and automate macOS UI with the Peekaboo CLI.
verdict: A broad, many-featured automation CLI (screenshots, input, and more) with zero scope-exclusion language, so it's likely to fire on requests better served elsewhere. No version field or changelog either, and the trigger phrasing is vague enough that even correct matches feel like luck.

highlights.summary: Nowhere in the description or body is there any 'NOT for' / out-of-scope / pointer-to-other-skill language, despite this being a broad, many-featured automation CLI (screenshots, i
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file — consumers have no way to tell if this skill has changed since they last tr
States what the skill does but gives no explicit 'use when...' phrasing or example user requests that would trigger it.
